input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Benchmark coverage gap at the COU resolution: the verification set spans a resolution range on average but the COU's specific resolution is unsampled.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 application-domain coverage; proto-taxonomy D-VER-06

case_context.cou: the operator surrogate is queried at 1024x1024 for a fine-scale decision

input.raw_artifact: Verification summary — neural operator. Verified at resolutions from 32x32 up to 512x512, reported as a range-average. The context of use queries the operator at 1024x1024 for a fine-scale decision; 1024x1024 is not in the verification set.

answer_key.gold_mechanism: The verification set spans resolutions on average but excludes the COU's 1024x1024 grid; neural operators do not guarantee resolution generalization past the verified range, so verification does not cover the decision point.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

forbidden_claims: asserts the 1024x1024 prediction is wrong (a verdict the coverage gap does not support)
treats average resolution coverage as coverage at the unsampled COU resolution

hardness.obvious_signal: the verification set covers 32x32 through 512x512 grids — looks like broad resolution coverage
hardness.conflicting_signal: the COU runs at 1024x1024, beyond every verified grid; operator-learning surrogates do not automatically generalize past the verified resolution, so the broad-but-bounded coverage does not include the decision point

label_provenance.external_grounding: FNO failure modes (arXiv:2601.11428): resolution generalization is not automatic; verification at coarser grids does not cover a finer COU resolution.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
